gpt_review.biasedText: But despite my loss, I accepted that President Trump’s visa policies were to weaken the regime, not hurt ordinary people. News of Khamenei’s death felt like a confirmation of that belief to me.
gpt_review.reason: Defensible: the article offers a one-sided narrative and does not acknowledge widely discussed counterarguments about the civilian costs of visa bans or military action. While this is an op-ed, the omission of alternative views in this passage contributes to slanted framing.

gpt_review.biasedText: Today, there’s no path to reform. Iranian figures such as Larijani, Rouhani, Hassan Khomeini, Mir-Hossein, Khatami, Zarif, Tajzadeh, Pezeshkian, Ghalibaf, Mohseni-Eje’i , and even Nobel Prize winner Narges Mohammadi are presented through the regime’s propaganda as a form of fake opposition. The majority of Iranians want Reza Pahlavi to be our transitional leader and guide us to the ballot box.
gpt_review.reason: The sweeping claims (e.g., “no path to reform,” “majority of Iranians want Reza Pahlavi”) are asserted without evidence, presented as settled fact. This fits opinion-as-fact bias even though it’s a first-person piece.

sonnet_false_negatives.biasedText: An open letter from the heart of Iran to America – Don’t give up on us
sonnet_false_negatives.reason: Emotive headline frames one anonymous account as a sweeping plea, priming readers emotionally.

sonnet_false_negatives.biasedText: Omid spoke to the Post from Tehran via friends in California. Efforts have been made to protect his identity.
sonnet_false_negatives.reason: Only one anonymous voice is presented with no corroboration or countervailing context to contested claims.

sonnet_false_negatives.biasedText: People at a nighttime street protest hold up signs that say “TRUMP” and “HELP”.
sonnet_false_negatives.reason: Image choice and caption amplify a pro-Trump framing aligned with the letter, without balancing visuals.

gpt_false_negatives.reason: The article relies on one anonymous perspective without corroboration or alternative viewpoints; GPT’s omission finding targeted a different passage, not this core sourcing gap.
